mapper.sql: RESUME_NO, DEPTID, CPNY_ID, DATE_CREATED, DATE_ENDED, DEPT_LEVEL, MANAGER_EMP_ID, DEPTNO, PARENT_DEPT_NO, WORK_AREA, DEPT_TYPE, ORG_NAME_ENG, ORG_NAME_LOCAL, ORG_LEVEL, COST_CENTER, IS_DEPT, IS_PART_TIME, PRODUCT_TYPE, USE_YN, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, CHANGE_TYPE, FEE_STANDARD, DEPT_DISTINGUISH_STANDARD, ORG_NAME_KO, ORG_NAME_VI
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ORG_INFO WHERE RESUME_NO = #{resumeNo} ORDER BY ORDERNO, DEPTNO
mapper.update: UPDATE ORG_INFO SET PARENT_DEPT_NO = #{parentDeptNo}, ORG_NAME_ENG = #{orgNameEng}, ORG_NAME_LOCAL = #{orgNameLocal}, DEPT_TYPE = #{deptType}, DEPT_LEVEL = #{deptLevel}, MANAGER_EMP_ID = #{managerEmpId}, DATE_CREATED = #{dateCreated, jdbcType=DATE}, IS_PART_TIME = #{isPartTime}, COST_CENTER = #{costCenter}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID} WHERE RESUME_NO = #{resumeNo} AND DEPTNO = #{deptNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ORG_INFO WHERE RESUME_NO = #{resumeNo} AND DEPTNO = #{deptNo}
mapper.select: SELECT T1.DEPTNO, T1.ORG_NAME_LOCAL, T1.MANAGER_EMP_ID, T1.IS_PART_TIME, T1.DEPT_LEVEL, T2.POSITION_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T2.POSITION_NO, #{lang}) as POSITION_NAME, T2.POST_GRADE_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T2.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang}) as POST_GRADE_NAME, T2.LOCAL_NAME as MANAGER_NAME, CASE WHEN T1.MANAGER_EMP_ID IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as VACANCY FROM ORG_INFO T1 LEFT JOIN ORG_EMPLOYEE T2 ON T1.RESUME_NO = T2.RESUME_NO AND T1.MANAGER_EMP_ID = T2.PERSON_ID WHERE T1.RESUME_NO = #{resumeNo} ORDER BY T1.ORDERNO, T1.DEPTNO
mapper.update: UPDATE ORG_INFO SET MANAGER_EMP_ID = #{managerEmpId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_PART_TIME = #{isPartTime, jdbcType=CHAR}, UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE RESUME_NO = #{resumeNo} AND DEPTNO = #{deptNo}
